title: Horizontal Alignment (Halign)
text: Horizontal Alignment (Halign) This property determines how the data (text or image) is aligned in the widget, entity, area frame, or window. Halign = Left | Center | Right Value Description (default) Data is positioned according to the .ini file. If no entry is specified, the system defaults are used: Center for Pictures and Command buttons or Left for Hyperlinks. Left Data is left-aligned. Center Data is positioned in the center of the widget, entity, area frame, or window. Right Data is right-aligned. Command Button For command buttons, this property only works if the Representation property is set to Uniface . Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(FLD1) = "halign=center ; valign=top" Copy Applies To CommandButton Hyperlink Image Name udefentity (Default Entity Widget ) Area Frames and Lines Background Image (BackImage) Entities Related Links Representation This property determines the appearance of the command button when running on the Microsoft Windows operating system (XP and later versions). One of Windows (default), Uniface, or Header. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
